name: claude-statusline
description: Displays Claude Code session info in the VS Code status bar — model, context usage, session/daily/weekly/monthly costs, and burn rate

claudeStatusline.refreshIntervalMs.description: How often to refresh the status bar (milliseconds)

claudeStatusline.priority.description: Status bar item priority (higher = further left)

claudeStatusline.contextWindowTokens.description: Context window size override in tokens. Auto-detected from JSONL session data when possible (e.g. 1M for opus-4-6[1m]).

claudeStatusline.cluster.markdownDescription: AI proxy cluster name. Falls back to `AI_PROXY_CLUSTER` env var, then `infra`.

claudeStatusline.apiKeyPath.markdownDescription: Path to bearer-token file for AI proxy. Falls back to `AI_PROXY_API_KEY` then `API_KEY` env vars.

claudeStatusline.proxyPollIntervalSecond.description: How often to poll the AI proxy for spend data (seconds).
